tips.Title: AliExpress to Facebook Marketplace Arbitrage
tips.Description:
Buy products at low prices from AliExpress and resell them on Facebook Marketplace in Moncton area at a higher price point. This is a proven arbitrage strategy - Smart Watches and other tech gadgets sell well locally. Focus on trending items with good profit margins and fast shipping times from AliExpress. I already tried this with Smartwatch, and it works.
                                                                                                                                Note: make sure that when you buy products in bulk from AliExpress, try to card like WealthSimple/EQBank (link on the top of this page) because they don't charge international transaction fee because AliExpress will charge you in US dollars.
